title: Nonatelia thwaitesii
taxonomy: Nonatelia thwaitesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and was first described by Joseph Dalton Hooker. The classification of Nonatelia thwaitesii includes its kingdom as Plantae, followed by its clade Angiosperms, then clade Eudicots, and subsequently clade Asterids. Further, it falls under the order Gentianales, family Gentianaceae, genus Nonatelia, and species N. thwaitesii. The classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and positions within the plant kingdom.
